name: RuleTester --all mode enumerates and runs every rule directory under the tests-dir per the §16 architecture contract
command:
mkdir -p tests/rule-a/valid tests/rule-b/valid && printf 'ok
' > tests/rule-a/valid/c.ts && printf 'ok
' > tests/rule-b/valid/c.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" --all --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule=rule-a' out.txt && grep -q 'rule=rule-b' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
